meta.name: Migrate buyback vault to V2 (burn-to-dead-address)
meta.description: Migrates the buyback vault from the broken V1 (which calls token.burn() that doesn't exist on the deployed tokens) to the new V2 (which transfers bought tokens to 0x...dEaD — works with any standard ERC20). Steps: (1) re-point FeeRouter to the new V2 vault, (2) sweep the old V1 BB vault balance to the Safe, (3) re-deposit that amount into V2 via VaultRecouper.recover() attributed to the founder token. After this batch executes, the Railway keeper (with VAULT_BUYBACK_ADDR updated to the V2 address) will call execute() on V2 and the buyback+burn will succeed — tokens will be transferred to 0x...dEaD permanently. The LPSupport vault is unchanged (it doesn't call token.burn(), it just adds liquidity post-graduation). IMPORTANT: re-check the live vault balances immediately before executing this batch since more trade fees land continuously — if balances have changed since this file was generated (2026-07-05), update the 'amount'/'value' fields below to match the CURRENT on-chain balance exactly, otherwise the sweep() amount will not equal the recover() value and MON could be left un-reattributed.
